top_signals.title: Oil Surges as US Strikes Targets in Iran Following Ship Attacks
top_signals.summary: Oil jumped — after gaining almost 3% on Tuesday — as the US launched a wave of strikes against Iran in retaliation for a spate of attacks on shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: FirstFT: US strikes Iran in response to attacks on tankers
top_signals.summary: Also in today’s newsletter: France’s Le Pen announces run for president, and Samsung shares tumble despite record quarterly profit
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board's annual bank stress test confirms that large banks are well positioned to weather a severe recession and able to continue to lend to households and businesses
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board's annual bank stress test confirms that large banks are well positioned to weather a severe recession and able to continue to lend to households and businesses
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: SEC plans crypto rule changes for exchanges and broker dealers in 2026 regulatory agenda
top_signals.summary: The SEC is laying the groundwork for cryptocurrency rule changes before the end of the year, with a blueprint for exchanges and brokers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
